query: anesthesia COPD patients home oxygen perioperative management guidelines

results.title: Office-Based Sedation/General Anesthesia for COPD Patients, Part I.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 30715953. 2018/01/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: The proprioceptive neuromuscular facilitation (PNF) stretching could 
improve the contractile capacity of respiratory muscles, but the effect on 
pulmonary function, when it is combined with aerobic training, remains unknown.
OBJECTIVE: To evaluate the effect of PNF combined with aerobic training on 
respiratory symptoms, pulmonary function and neck/shoulder mobility in patients 
with COPD.
DESIGN: Randomized controlled trial.
PARTICIPANTS: Fift
